title: BAMBUS - 211info
text: BAMBUS GRAND RONDE BAMBUS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Mobile bus providing basic needs for babies and children, including diapers, wipes, and formula. 9675 Grand Ronde Road Grand Ronde, OR 97347 Eligibility: Low-income families Hours: 3rd Friday of the month 10am-2pm (503) 623-4618 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 623-4618 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof that the dependant child resides at the same address as client applying (WIC, OHP card, TANF, etc.) AREA SERVED: Benton, Linn, Marion, Polk and Yamhill Counties Services: Diapers Formula/Baby Food Outreach Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
